'''竏嗾h-dh-zh''' ('''kathadhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loco|loco]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loco|loco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾h-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhazh|thithadhazh]] || [[word:jithadhazh|jithadhazh]] || [[word:shithadhazh|shithadhazh]] || [[word:kithadhazh|kithadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhazh|thuthuthadhazh]] || [[word:jujuthadhazh|jujuthadhazh]] || [[word:shushuthadhazh|shushuthadhazh]] || [[word:kukuthadhazh|kukuthadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhazh|thuthadhazh]] || [[word:juthadhazh|juthadhazh]] || [[word:shuthadhazh|shuthadhazh]] || [[word:kuthadhazh|kuthadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhazh|thuthadhazh]] || [[word:juthadhazh|juthadhazh]] || [[word:shuthadhazh|shuthadhazh]] || [[word:kuthadhazh|kuthadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadhazh|thethadhazh]] || [[word:jethadhazh|jethadhazh]] || [[word:shethadhazh|shethadhazh]] || [[word:kethadhazh|kethadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadhazh|thothothadhazh]] || [[word:jojothadhazh|jojothadhazh]] || [[word:shoshothadhazh|shoshothadhazh]] || [[word:kokothadhazh|kokothadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhazh|thothadhazh]] || [[word:jothadhazh|jothadhazh]] || [[word:shothadhazh|shothadhazh]] || [[word:kothadhazh|kothadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhazh|thothadhazh]] || [[word:jothadhazh|jothadhazh]] || [[word:shothadhazh|shothadhazh]] || [[word:kothadhazh|kothadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦthadhazh|thﾃｦthadhazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦthadhazh|jﾃｦthadhazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦthadhazh|shﾃｦthadhazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦthadhazh|kﾃｦthadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhazh|thathathadhazh]] || [[word:jajathadhazh|jajathadhazh]] || [[word:shashathadhazh|shashathadhazh]] || [[word:kakathadhazh|kakathadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhazh|thathadhazh]] || [[word:jathadhazh|jathadhazh]] || [[word:shathadhazh|shathadhazh]] || [[word:kathadhazh|kathadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhazh|thathadhazh]] || [[word:jathadhazh|jathadhazh]] || [[word:shathadhazh|shathadhazh]] || [[word:kathadhazh|kathadhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathadhazh|shathadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathadhazh|goshathadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathadhazh|gokishathadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathadhazhnﾃｼ|shathadhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnknﾃｼ|goshathadhazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhnﾃｼ|gokishathadhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathadhazhshﾃｫ|shathadhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫ|goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhshﾃｫ|gokishathadhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhazhro|shathadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkro|goshathadhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhro|gokishathadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhazhmu|shathadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkmu|goshathadhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhmu|gokishathadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathadhazhsher|shathadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnksher|goshathadhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhsher|gokishathadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathadhazhng|shathadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkng|goshathadhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhng|gokishathadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathadhazhya|shathadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkya|goshathadhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhya|gokishathadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathadhazhyam|shathadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkyam|goshathadhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhyam|gokishathadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shathadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshathadhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishathadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhazhnﾃｼro|shathadhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnknﾃｼro|goshathadhazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhnﾃｼro|gokishathadhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhazhnﾃｼmu|shathadhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnknﾃｼmu|goshathadhazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhnﾃｼmu|gokishathadhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shathadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishathadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhazhshﾃｫro|shathadhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫro|goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhshﾃｫro|gokishathadhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhazhshﾃｫmu|shathadhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshathadhazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhshﾃｫmu|gokishathadhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhazhronﾃｼ|shathadhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkronﾃｼ|goshathadhazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhronﾃｼ|gokishathadhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhazhroshﾃｫ|shathadhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshathadhazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhroshﾃｫ|gokishathadhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhazhromu|shathadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkromu|goshathadhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhromu|gokishathadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhazhmunﾃｼ|shathadhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshathadhazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhmunﾃｼ|gokishathadhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhazhmushﾃｫ|shathadhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshathadhazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhmushﾃｫ|gokishathadhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhazhmuro|shathadhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhazhnkmuro|goshathadhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhazhmuro|gokishathadhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
